skill: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
rationale:
Choice D is correct. Multiplying both sides of x/3 = 7 by 3 gives x = 21.

Choice A is incorrect; it results from adding 3 instead of multiplying. Choice B is incorrect; it results from subtracting 3 from 7. Choice C is incorrect; it results from dividing instead of multiplying.
